findings.title: Unsafe Java Deserialization of Pipeline Import
findings.description: User-supplied base64 payload deserialized with ObjectInputStream.readObject() enabling arbitrary code execution via gadget chains

findings.title: Unsafe Java Deserialization in Object Store Retrieval
findings.description: Object store retrieval deserializes attacker-controlled bytes with ObjectInputStream.readObject() across two separate endpoints

findings.title: Remote JAR Loading via URLClassLoader
findings.description: Extension endpoint loads and instantiates classes from user-supplied remote JAR URL via URLClassLoader and reflection

findings.title: Script Engine Evaluation of User-Supplied Code
findings.description: Transform endpoint evaluates user-supplied JavaScript via ScriptEngine.eval() which can access Java classes for arbitrary code execution
